description: Set up environment: download dependencies, verify current tests pass, verify build succeeds, verify lint passes before making any changes.
steps: Run `go mod download` to fetch all current dependencies
Run `go test ./...` to confirm all existing tests pass
Run `CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o /dev/null .` to confirm the build succeeds
Run `golangci-lint run ./...` to confirm lint passes
findings: go mod download: OK. go test ./...: All tests pass (14 packages tested, no failures). CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o /dev/null .: Build succeeds. golangci-lint run ./...: 28 pre-existing lint issues found (6 errcheck, 1 govet shadow, 21 revive missing-comments). errcheck is a default linter in golangci-lint v2.1.6 but not explicitly listed in .golangci.yaml enable list. CI (CircleCI) does not run golangci-lint, only go test and go build. These issues exist on master before any migration changes.
